positive: A symmetrical, stylized depiction of celestial flora and fauna, featuring bioluminescent hummingbirds interacting with glowing crystalline flowers and nebula-patterned leaves. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau engraving and modern vector art, characterized by intricate linework, bold negative space, and clean, flowing silhouettes. Use a color palette dominated by deep midnight blues, ethereal teal, neon violet, and sharp luminous gold highlights, emphasizing maximum contrast. The composition must be centrally focused and highly detailed, designed to wrap seamlessly around a garment, resembling an elaborate, stylized repeating mandala pattern. Studio-quality print artwork, perfect for screen printing.
negative: low detail, fuzzy, blurry, amateur, poor anatomy, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, cropped, ugly, bad composition, grain, noise
